message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Search Product by ID

actor "User" as user
participant "Main" as main
database "Database" as db

box MainMenu #LightGrey {
    participant "MainMenu" as menu
}

box ProductReportDialog #LightGrey {
    participant "ProductReportDialog" as dialog
}

box ProductDatabaseDAO #LightGrey {
    participant "ProductDatabaseDAO" as dao
}

box Product #LightGrey {
    participant "Product\n:product" as product
}

box SimpleListModel #LightGrey {
    participant "SimpleListModel\n:model" as model
}

user -> main : <<main>>
activate main
main -> menu : <<create>>
activate menu

menu -> user : clicks 'View Products'
menu -> dialog : <<create>>
activate dialog

dialog -> dao : <<create>>
activate dao

note right of dialog: as shown in\n'View Products'\ndiagram

dao --> menu : list of products displayed
deactivate dao
deactivate dialog

user -> dialog : user types productID\ninto field; clicks "Search"
activate dialog

dialog -> dao : findProd(productID)
activate dao

dao -> db : search product by ID
activate db
db -->> dao : resultSet
deactivate db

dao -> dao : extract product details\nfrom ResultSet into variables

dao -> product : <<construct>>
activate product

dao -> product : set products fields\nfrom variables
deactivate product

dialog -> model : <<construct>>
activate model

dialog -> model : updateItems(products)
deactivate model

dialog -> dialog : jList.setModel(model)

dialog --> user : product displayed
deactivate dialog
deactivate dao
deactivate menu
deactivate main

@enduml
```
